hero: I work as a Software Developer and Delivery Expert at Lectra, where I focus on developing, optimizing, and tailoring software solutions for complex fashion-tech contexts.
I implement new features, optimize existing ones, and fix application behaviors, with constant attention to customer needs and product quality.

The product I work on, Kubix Link, spans front-end, back-end, databases, APIs, external service integrations, and custom code for specific client needs. This experience gave me a broad, practical view of what it takes to build and maintain a complex web application.
